---
title: "Contact"
---

## Maintainer

- Email: [neerajdhanraj@gmail.com](mailto:neerajdhanraj@gmail.com)

## Support / Questions

For questions, bug reports, and feature requests, the preferred channel is GitHub Issues:

- https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues

## Links

- Website: https://vedicdatetime.org
- CRAN: https://cran.r-project.org/package=VedicDateTime
- GitHub: https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime
- Paper: https://doi.org/10.1007/s11042-023-16553-w
